name: Menubar
description: Menubar is a horizontal menu component.

props.name: breakpoint
props.description: The breakpoint to define the maximum width boundary.

props.name: buttonProps
props.description: Used to pass all properties of the HTMLButtonElement to the menu button.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines a string value that labels an interactive element.

props.name: ariaLabelledby
props.description: Identifier of the underlying input element.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

slots.name: item
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Label property of the menuitem */ label: string | ((...args: any) => string) | undefined; /** * Binding properties of the menuitem */ props: MenubarRouterBindProps; /** * State of the root */ root: boolean; /** * Whether or not there is a submenu */ hasSubmenu: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: menubutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current id state as a string */ id: string; /** * Style class of component */ class: string; /** * Toggle event */ toggleCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom menu button template on responsive mode.

slots.name: button
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current id state as a string */ id: string; /** * Style class of component */ class: string; /** * Toggle event */ toggleCallback: () => void; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom menu button template on responsive mode.

slots.name: menubuttonicon
slots.description: Custom menu button icon template on responsive mode.

slots.name: submenuicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Whether item is root */ root: boolean; /** * Whether item is active */ active: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: itemicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Menuitem instance */ item: MenuItem; /** * Style class of the item icon element. */ class: any; }): VNode[]
